arts.sum: Olympique Lyonnais will host Stade Brestois at Parc OL for Matchday 24 of Ligue 1. After a narrow 3-2 defeat against Paris Saint-Germain, Paulo Fonseca’s side will be eager to bounce back and stay i...

arts.ttl: Paulo Fonseca confirms Thiago Almada will start against Brest
arts.sum: Thiago Almada (23) is set to earn his first start for Olympique Lyonnais this weekend when the club host Stade Brestois at the Groupama Stadium on Sunday afternoon. The Argentine…
